metadata.name: Conduct a Legal Review of an Investigative Piece

description: Before publishing a sensitive investigative story that names individuals, an editor must have it reviewed by the legal department for libel risk.

nodes.task_description: Flag the completed draft for legal review in the workflow system.

expected_outcome.value: The story is marked as needing legal review.

nodes.task_description: Share the draft and all supporting documentation (interview notes, source documents) with the legal department via a secure channel.

expected_outcome.value: The legal team receives all necessary materials for their review.

nodes.task_description: Receive feedback from the legal team and work with the reporter to make any required changes to mitigate risk.

expected_outcome.value: The article is revised based on legal advice.
